name: citrix_hypervisor
explanation: Citrix Hypervisor (formerly XenServer) exposes its RRD metrics over an HTTP endpoint (`/host_rrd`, `/rrd_updates`) protected by HTTP Basic auth against the XAPI user database. The check uses the standard `instances/http` template, which inherits `username`/`password` and forwards them to the inner HTTP client. While `username`/`password` are not strictly `required: true` in the spec, the XAPI endpoints will not return RRD data without a valid hypervisor login, so a real deployment cannot be auto-configured without them. Even the URL itself is per-host (each pool master has its own management address). Pattern D / E.
notes: Only `url` is `required: true` in the spec, but the upstream XAPI requires HTTP Basic credentials to return host_rrd/rrd_updates. There is no unauthenticated default deployment.
